value.found_quote: Tasks have three states: pending, in progress, and completed. Tasks can also depend on other tasks: a pending task with unresolved dependencies cannot be claimed until those dependencies are completed.
value.rationale: The page describes a shared task list with self-coordination, explicitly stating "Shared task list with self-coordination" in the comparison table and "Shared list of work items that teammates claim and complete" in the architecture table. It also describes task states (pending, in progress, completed) and dependencies. The feature is part of agent teams which the page states are "experimental and disabled by default," so lifecycle is preview/experimental.
